title: Thinking block component for agent chat with expandable content
purpose: Displays agent thinking content that can be either streaming or expanded/collapsed. Shows a pulsing indicator during streaming and allows users to toggle expanded view of thinking content.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named ThinkingBlock that accepts text and streaming props. Uses React state to manage expansion state for non-streaming content.

steps.content: Initialize the expansion state for the component.
IF the component is in streaming mode, render a pulsing indicator and the thinking text.
ELSE render a toggle button with character count and conditional rendering of the thinking text.
Handle click events on the toggle button to switch between expanded and collapsed states.
